title: HEAD START - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS COUNTY CHILDREN'S COMMISSION HEAD START Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Head Start services promote school readiness by enhancing the social and cognitive development of children in a classroom setting and by providing educational, health, nutritional, social, and other services to children and families. Parental engagement is emphasized. Services for parents include goal setting and support, parenting classes and opportunities for parents to network. 16518 SE River Road Milwaukie, OR 97267 Eligibility: Families with children ages 3-5, resource (foster) families, unhoused families, and families receiving public assistance, such as; Temporary Assistance for Needy Families (TANF), Supplemental Security Income (SSI), Employment Related Day Care (ERDC) and, SNAP assistance are eligible regardless of income. Families with the highest needs are prioritized for services. Hours: Reception hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm School: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday between 8:15am to 3:15pm Email (503) 675-4565 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 675-4565 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information and to register FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation services avialable for additonal languages. AREA SERVED: Clackamas County Services: Head Start Preschools School Readiness Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EARLY HEAD START INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS COUNTY CHILDREN'S COMMISSION
